findings.summary: ArtifactManifest deletion markers cannot pass validator revalidation because the absent path is always opened.
Git stdout and stderr are not execution-time bounded and every git show failure is misclassified as deletion.

Shared repository Git-config/environment policy remains declined as out-of-scope under accepted same-UID host trust assumption.
